lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It will require significant mechanical attention before it can be driven safely, as the engine currently runs poorly and there are noticeable leaks in the undercarriage. Cosmetically, the car shows its age with several large dents, peeling clear coat on the hood and roof, and some rust starting to form around the wheel wells. The interior has seen heavy use, with tears in the upholstery and non-functional electronics, including the radio and air conditioning. This is a project car or a candidate for parts, and we recommend towing it from the lot.
This vehicle is in fair condition. It shows moderate wear on both the interior and exterior. The car is currently operational but will require some maintenance and minor repairs in the near future.
The vehicle is in good condition. It is mechanically reliable and functions as intended. The interior and exterior show minor signs of wear from normal use.

Ready for a rewarding project? This vehicle is a fantastic opportunity for any mechanic or DIY enthusiast looking for a budget-friendly challenge! While it requires significant mechanical and cosmetic repairs, it has great bones and is priced to move. Take advantage of this value-packed chance to restore a car to your exact specifications!

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is, ideally for a buyer looking for a project or parts donor. Mechanically, the engine suffers from significant oil consumption and a noticeable head gasket leak, while the transmission exhibits frequent slipping and delayed engagement. The exterior shows its age with substantial rust along the frame and wheel wells, several prominent dents, and failing clear coat on all horizontal surfaces. This exceptional vehicle exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. Having been maintained to rigorous standards, it presents in commendable condition, offering the sophisticated driver a seamless blend of reliability and performance. The cabin environment remains well-preserved, reflecting a history of attentive ownership. We invite you to experience a vehicle that stands as a testament to enduring quality and engineering excellence.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive! It’s in really solid shape and has clearly been well-loved and taken care of over the years. It's the perfect fit for someone looking for a reliable car that still looks great hitting the road. It runs like a dream and is totally ready for its next big adventure with you. Come take it for a spin—I just know you're going to love it!

Featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, this E46 M3 is a mechanically sound example of BMW’s engineering peak. The powertrain benefits from a comprehensive VANOS service and a reinforced rear subframe, ensuring structural integrity under high torque loads. Power is transmitted via a 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox to a factory limited-slip differential. The suspension geometry remains precise, providing excellent feedback through the hydraulic steering rack. While showing minor aesthetic patina consistent with a well-loved driver, the mechanical vitals are superb, with individual throttle bodies delivering instantaneous response. A visceral, analog
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean interior. Reliable performance. Title in hand.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and daily practicality. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish, showing only the minor, expected signs of careful road use that come with a well-loved car. Inside, the cabin is a testament to pride of ownership; the premium upholstery is supple and free of tears, while all electronic features—including the navigation system and dual-zone climate control—function flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in robust health, having benefited from a strict preventative maintenance schedule. It starts promptly, shifts smoothly through all gears, and provides a quiet, composed ride. With ample tread remaining on the tires and a clean service history, this is a turn-key vehicle ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies consistent care and mechanical integrity. This unit has undergone a thorough professional inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and safety. Featuring a clean aesthetic and a robust powertrain, it offers a refined driving experience and exceptional long-term value for the discerning motorist.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and consistent care. This specimen has undergone a rigorous professional inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. Offering a balanced synthesis of durability and refined comfort, this motorcar represents an exceptional acquisition for the discerning driver seeking a dependable, high-caliber driving experience.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that’s been truly loved and well-maintained? I’m parting with my car and it’s in wonderful shape! It has been super reliable for me and still looks fantastic inside and out. It drives like a dream and is totally ready for its next big adventure with you. You’re going to absolutely love how smooth it feels on the road!

Used vehicle in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Reliable daily driver.

This vehicle is a stellar example of pride in ownership, presenting in excellent condition both mechanically and aesthetically. The exterior paint retains a brilliant luster, showing only the lightest evidence of careful road use, while the alloy wheels are free of major scuffs. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean and well-preserved; the upholstery is supple, the carpets are pristine, and every electronic feature—from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system—functions exactly as it should. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, benefiting from a consistent service history that ensures a reliable and responsive drive. Whether you're commuting or taking a long-distance trip, this car offers a tight, quiet ride that feels substantial on the road. It is a turn-key vehicle, fully detailed and ready for its next chapter.

Presented here is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and safety. With a documented service history and a well-preserved interior, this vehicle offers a sophisticated driving experience and exceptional long-term value for the discerning motorist.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers an exceptional balance of performance and long-term value. Presenting in commendable condition, it features a documented service history and has undergone a rigorous mechanical inspection to ensure optimal reliability. A sophisticated choice for the discerning driver seeking quality and professional-grade assurance.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s ready for your next adventure? This car has been so good to me and is still in wonderful shape! It runs super smoothly and has been well-loved, so it's all set to hit the road with its next owner. I’m honestly so excited for whoever gets to drive this beauty home—you’re going to love it!

This E46 M3 features the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, complete with individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing for a linear power band. Power is managed through a Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and a factory limited-slip differential. The chassis is mechanically sound with a reinforced subframe and updated bushings, ensuring precise turn-in and lateral stability. While the exterior shows minor road-derived character, the drivetrain remains robust, having recently undergone a cooling system refresh and valve adjustment to maintain peak volumetric efficiency. A true driver’s specimen with exceptional throttle response.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Regularly serviced. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear only.

This vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking reliability and a polished aesthetic. The exterior maintains a deep, glossy finish, though close inspection will reveal minor stone chips and faint surface marks consistent with careful daily use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the leather upholstery is supple with only light creasing on the driver’s bolster, and all interior electronics—including the infotainment system and climate control—operate perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in strong health, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and a quiet, responsive engine that has been serviced at regular intervals. The tires have significant tread life remaining, and the suspension remains tight and comfortable. This is a well-maintained, honest car that is ready for the road immediately.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies consistent performance and aesthetic integrity. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this automobile offers a superior balance of mechanical reliability and sophisticated styling. It represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a dependable, high-caliber transport solution.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and value. Having undergone a comprehensive professional assessment, the automobile demonstrates consistent mechanical integrity and a preserved aesthetic. This offering represents a premier opportunity for a sophisticated buyer seeking a dependable, high-caliber driving experience.

Hey there! I'm parting with my absolute favorite ride, and it's looking for a new home! This car has been so well-loved and is in really wonderful shape. It drives like a dream and has been super reliable for me. Whether you're commuting or heading out on a weekend trip, it's totally ready to go! Come take it for a spin—I just know you're going to love it as much as I have!

This E92 M3 features the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8, delivering 414 hp with a razor-sharp 8,400 RPM redline facilitated by eight individual throttle bodies. The chassis remains taut, benefitting from a recent suspension refresh including upgraded bushings and a comprehensive subframe inspection.
Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Minimal exterior wear. Runs smooth. Title in hand.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a premium driving experience for the discerning buyer. The exterior paint retains a deep, glossy luster, showing only the lightest signs of careful road use, while the body panels remain straight and true. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of comfort; the high-quality upholstery is free of any significant wear or blemishes, and every electronic feature—from the crisp infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—operates exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, reflecting a history of consistent, professional servicing. We have recently performed a comprehensive multi-point inspection, ensuring the brakes are sharp, the suspension is tight, and the tires have plenty of miles left to travel. This car drives with the confidence and poise of a much newer model, making it a reliable and sophisticated choice for your daily commute or weekend getaways.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, ensuring optimal performance and reliability for the discerning driver. With a documented service history and a well-preserved interior, this vehicle represents a superior value proposition within its class.
